name: NGEx Minerals Ltd.
description: NGEx Minerals is a leading exploration company based in Vancouver, Canada, focused on the discovery and definition of new world-class mineral resources. The company is primarily engaged in the exploration and development of copper-gold projects in South America, specifically within the emerging Vicuña District. Its key assets include the high-grade Lunahuasi deposit in San Juan Province, Argentina, and a majority interest in the large-scale Los Helados copper-gold development project located in Region III, Chile. NGEx Minerals is committed to advancing these projects to unlock significant value within the mining industry.
